name: Canon Europa N.V
tagline: Printing · Medical · Imaging · Industrial · OCI + Azure · 39 Countries
automation: Custom Scripts · Native Automation · ELK Dashboards
demoBrief: RFP procurement. No previous AIOps. Cost -30%, MTTR -60%, AI-led operations, zero-ticketing. Baseline MTTR 6-7 business days. Oracle/OCI estate. EBS and Informatica 24x7 teams. FAM=TCS outsourced.

transferConfig.from: TCS Managed Services — incl. FAM outsourced team (70%)

categories.label: Runbooks & SOPs
categories.detail: ZeroOps auto-generated 19 validated runbooks from 6 months of live incident resolution. Informatica and Oracle EBS OTC complete.

categories.label: Knowledge Base
categories.detail: 14 KB articles built automatically from resolved incidents — no manual authoring. Pattern confidence scores attached to every article.

categories.label: Automation Coverage
categories.detail: Informatica auto-recovery (91%) and Oracle EBS ship confirm reprocessing (75%) fully automated. DD mandate and Primavera correction in progress.

categories.label: GCC Shadowing
categories.detail: GCC team shadowing live incidents via ZeroOps for 3 months. Informatica and Oracle EBS OTC sessions complete. Oracle Finance and Primavera scheduled.

categories.label: GCC Go-Live Testing
categories.detail: Parallel run testing complete for Informatica recovery. Oracle EBS ship confirm testing underway. Oracle Finance Q1 2027.

categories.label: Tribal Knowledge
categories.detail: 12 critical patterns documented — quarter-end EBS procedures captured from Dec 2026 close. 8 remaining including Accenture DD coordination.

risks.label: FAM Team Knowledge Transfer — TCS Outsourced Integration Ops
risks.mitigation: FAM team (TCS) manual Informatica ops now 91% automated by ZeroOps. GCC inherits automation, not manual runbooks. Remaining 9% complex cases documented in KB-CN-001.

risks.label: Oracle EBS Quarter-End Procedures — Dec'26 Close Captured
risks.mitigation: Dec 2026 quarter-end close fully documented by ZeroOps — 8 resolution patterns added to KB automatically. Mar 2027 close will be the final validation before handover.

risks.label: Accenture DD Rerun Coordination — GCC Relationship Establishing

risks.label: XURRENT Admin Access — GCC Fully Provisioned
risks.mitigation: XURRENT SaaS admin roles provisioned for GCC team in month 3. All incident workflows tested and validated.

risks.label: OCI Console Access — GCC Operational
risks.mitigation: OCI IAM roles provisioned and validated in month 2. GCC team operating OCI console independently.
